conditional_principle.name: ColorBalancedQuadraticRepairDescent_D10
conditional_principle.statement: The first nonzero beyond-current-carrier D10 repair is quadratic in eta_source, with charged contraction delta_alpha2_tree = -(sqrt(N_c)/2)*alpha2_mz*eta_source^2 and neutral color-balanced uplift delta_alphaY_perp = N_c*alphaY_mz*eta_source^2.

conditional_theorem.name: minimal_conditional_d10_forward_repair_law
conditional_theorem.statement: Assuming ColorBalancedQuadraticRepairDescent_D10, the repair law is uniquely tau2_exact = -(sqrt(N_c)/2)*eta_source^2 and delta_n_exact = (N_c/2)*(1-beta_EW)*eta_source^2.

notes: This artifact records the current open split beneath the target-free D10 repair candidate.
It records the sharpest earlier split between source-only underdetermination and the smallest supported conditional closure route.
The W/Z mass lane and the Ward-projected electromagnetic theorem sit above this split on separate D10 surfaces.

unconditional_theorem.name: current_corpus_underdetermination_of_forward_d10_repair_law
unconditional_theorem.statement: For arbitrary real (c,d), the source-only family tau2_exact = -c*eta_source^2 and delta_n_exact = d*(1-beta_EW)*eta_source^2 defines a coherent runtime-forward D10 repair law. Therefore the current emitted corpus does not determine a unique forward repair coefficient pair.
